column1: # OBI-associated mutation knowledge base for HBV surface antigen (HBsAg)
#   hbv_region    : S, pre-S1, pre-S2, MHR, a-determinant
#   nt_position_hbv: approximate nucleotide position on HBV reference (J02203/AY128092)
#   aa_position   : amino acid position in the surface protein (S reading frame)
#   category      : A (strong evidence), B (moderate), C (preliminary/single report)
#   effect        : diagnostic_escape, immune_escape, secretion_defect, replication_defect, structural
#   mechanism     : e.g. conformational_change, glycosylation_loss, stop_codon, pre-S_deletion
# NOTE: Positions are approximate and referenced to genotype A (J02203).
#       Always validate against the actual genotype consensus for your samples.
